---
name: doctrine-promotion-optional
description: "Doctrine promotion across projects (pre-correction framing)."
metadata:
  node_type: memory
  type: project
---

When a lesson generalizes across projects, projects may pick it up as it suits them. The recognition is advisory and project teams should consider whether the wider rule applies to their local situation.

Premises: [[consultation-must-be-load-bearing]]. The premise names the obligation; this memory documents the cross-project shape. Adoption is optional and timing is left to operator judgment.
